ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-03-2019 Off Calendar

ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-08-2019 Continued To Apr-16-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel and defendant's counsel are sanctioned $400.00 each for failure to appear. The Order To Show Cause is re-set to Mar-12-2019 at 10:30 am in Department 610. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

*** Matter was recalled. Robert Sullivan, Esq. appearing for the plaintiff. No other appearance. For good cause and to the satisfaction of the Court, the $400.00 sanctions issued against plaintiff's counsel is vacated. The Jurisdiction of the Arbitrator is extended to Mar-11-2019. The Order To Show Cause is re-set to APR-16-2019 at 10:30 am in Department 610. Judge: TERI L. JACKSON; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported. ***
